hero.name: Gabriel Kanawati
hero.subtitle: FullStack developer passionate about building scalable, elegant solutions

about.title: About <1>Me</1>
about.bio: Full-stack developer specializing in backend development, currently working at CashMe with microservices, payment APIs, and banking integrations. Passionate about building scalable, user-friendly applications using modern technologies. I believe in "Never Stop Learning" and constantly explore new tools and frameworks to deliver elegant solutions to complex problems. When I'm not coding, you'll find me contributing to open-source projects and sharing knowledge with the developer community.

contact.title: Get In <1>Touch</1>
contact.subtitle: Feel free to reach out for collaborations or just to connect!
